name: Solar Farm Gimbal Inspection Patrol
description: You are a Renewable Energy Asset Inspector. Configure a drone for an automated thermal patrol of solar farm substations. Enable the MAVLink gimbal (MNT1_TYPE = 2) and create a mission plan for the three substations listed in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_brief.txt. For each substation, the mission must include a waypoint at 30m altitude, a camera pitch of -60 degrees during a 15-second loiter, and a pitch reset to 0 degrees for transit. Include a Return to Launch (RTL) command and save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/solar_patrol.plan.
